title: Aam Pora Shorbot
instructions: Roast the raw mangoes over an open flame or in an oven until the skin is charred and the pulp inside is soft.
Let the mangoes cool down completely. Peel off the charred skin and scoop out the pulp.
In a blender, combine the mango pulp, sugar, roasted cumin powder, and black salt.
Blend to a smooth paste.
To serve, add 2-3 tablespoons of this paste to a glass.
Top with chilled water and stir well.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves and serve immediately.

title: Masala Chai
instructions: In a saucepan, add water, ginger, cardamom, cinnamon, and cloves.
Bring it to a boil.
Add tea leaves and let it simmer for a minute.
Add milk and sugar, and bring it to a boil.
Simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Strain the tea into cups and serve hot.

title: Mango Lassi
instructions: Add chopped mango, yogurt, milk, and sugar to a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses.
Garnish with a pinch of cardamom powder and serve chilled.

title: Cold Coffee
instructions: In a small bowl, mix coffee powder and hot water until the coffee dissolves.
In a blender, combine the coffee mixture, chilled milk, sugar, and ice cubes.
Blend until frothy and smooth.
Drizzle chocolate sauce inside the serving glasses, if desired.
Pour the cold coffee into the glasses and serve immediately.

title: Nimbu Pani (Indian Lemonade)
ingredients: A pinch of roasted cumin powder
instructions: Squeeze the juice from the lemon into a pitcher.
Add sugar, black salt, and roasted cumin powder.
Pour in the chilled water and stir well until the sugar dissolves.
Garnish with mint leaves and serve.

title: Jaljeera
instructions: Blend mint leaves, coriander leaves, ginger, and tamarind pulp into a fine paste with a little water.
Strain the paste into a large pitcher.
Add cumin powder, black salt, and asafoetida.
Pour in the chilled water and mix everything well.
Garnish with boondi before serving.

title: Thandai
instructions: Soak almonds, poppy seeds, fennel seeds, peppercorns, and cardamoms in water for at least 2 hours.
Drain the water and grind the soaked ingredients into a fine paste.
In a blender, combine the paste, sugar, and chilled milk.
Blend until smooth.
Strain the mixture through a fine sieve.
Garnish with saffron strands and serve chilled.

title: Sugarcane Juice
instructions: If you have a sugarcane juicer, extract the juice.
Otherwise, this is best enjoyed fresh from a street vendor.
To the fresh juice, add lemon juice, crushed ginger, and black salt.
Stir well.
Garnish with mint leaves and serve immediately over ice.

title: Buttermilk (Chaas)
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk the yogurt until smooth.
Gradually add cold water and continue whisking.
Add roasted cumin powder and black salt. Mix well.
Garnish with chopped coriander leaves and serve chilled.

title: Badam Milk
instructions: Blanch and peel the almonds. Grind them to a fine paste with a little milk.
Boil the remaining milk in a saucepan.
Add the almond paste, sugar, and saffron. Stir well.
Simmer for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add cardamom powder and mix.
Serve hot or chilled.

title: Rose Milk
ingredients: A few drops of rose water
instructions: In a pitcher, combine chilled milk, rose syrup, sugar (if using), and rose water.
Stir well until everything is mixed.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

title: Watermelon Juice
instructions: Place the chopped watermelon in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Strain the juice through a sieve to remove any pulp.
Add lemon juice and black salt. Stir well.
Pour into glasses, garnish with mint leaves, and serve chilled.

title: Ginger Tea
ingredients: 1 tsp tea leaves or 1 tea bag
instructions: In a saucepan, bring water and grated ginger to a boil.
Simmer for 5 minutes.
Add tea leaves/bag and steep for 2-3 minutes.
Strain the tea into a cup.
Stir in honey/sugar and lemon juice (if using).
Serve hot.

title: Filter Coffee
instructions: Add coffee powder to the upper chamber of a coffee filter.
Press it down lightly with the tamper.
Pour hot water over it and cover.
Let the coffee decoction drip into the lower chamber (takes 10-15 mins).
Boil the milk and froth it by pouring it back and forth between two tumblers.
In a tumbler, add 1/4 cup of the coffee decoction, sugar, and top with frothed milk.
Serve hot in a dabarah and tumbler.

title: Sweet Lassi
ingredients: A few strands of saffron for garnish
instructions: In a blender, combine yogurt, milk/water, and sugar.
Blend until smooth and frothy.
Pour into glasses.
Garnish with cardamom powder and saffron strands.
Serve chilled.

title: Coconut Water with Mint
ingredients: A handful of fresh mint leaves
instructions: Lightly muddle the mint leaves in a pitcher.
Add coconut water, lemon juice, and black salt.
Stir well to combine the flavors.
Serve chilled, with a few mint leaves in each glass.

title: Pineapple Juice
instructions: In a blender, combine pineapple chunks, water, and sugar (if using).
Blend until smooth.
Strain the juice through a fine-mesh sieve to remove the pulp.
Stir in the black salt.
Serve chilled.

title: Orange Juice
instructions: Wash the oranges and cut them in half.
Use a juicer or a citrus squeezer to extract the juice.
For a smoother juice, you can strain it through a sieve.
Add a pinch of black salt if desired and stir.
Serve immediately.

title: Mixed Fruit Juice
instructions: Combine all the fruits in a blender.
Add water and blend until smooth.
Strain the juice through a sieve to separate the pulp.
Stir in the black salt.
Serve chilled.

title: Hot Chocolate
ingredients: Whipped cream or marshmallows for topping (optional)
instructions: In a saucepan, whisk together cocoa powder, sugar, and salt.
Gradually whisk in the milk until the mixture is smooth.
Heat over medium heat, stirring constantly, until hot. Do not boil.
Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
Pour into mugs and top with whipped cream or marshmallows if desired.
Serve immediately.
